member.name: P:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapshotsManagement.ISnapshotManager.HasSnapshot
member.summary: Property HasSnapshot is set to true RIGHT BEFORE the snapshot is started to load (in comparison to CurrentSnapshot.Value which is set AFTER the snapshot has been loaded).

member.name: M:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapshotsManagement.ISnapshotManager.SaveSnapshotAs(JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapShotApi.ISnapshot,System.Action{JetBrains.Util.FileSystemPath},System.String)
member.returns: true if fie was saved, false if user pressed Cancel during snapshot saving.

member.name: M:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapshotsManagement.ISnapshotManager.Open(JetBrains.Util.FileSystemPath,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Check whether the given snapshot is already loaded and if not - start standard opening procedure.

member.name: M:JetBrains.dotTrace.SnapshotsManagement.ISnapshotManager.OpenAside(JetBrains.Lifetimes.Lifetime,JetBrains.Util.FileSystemPath)
member.summary: Perform opening of a snapshot without making it a proper component container, thus initialization of its components is not performed. This is done e.g. in the case of loading a snapshot for views comparison, where we need just raw snapshot data.
